notes: The packaged runtime currently uses this Cone Guy-inspired prototype skin by default.
Replace these files with SpriteCook-generated siblings later while keeping the logical asset labels stable.
Generate the clerk first and treat that asset_id as the future reference_asset_id anchor.

spritecook_plan.label: mailroom-clerk
spritecook_plan.prompt: Tiny professional mailroom clerk sprite, front-facing 3/4 side view for desktop UI companion, same visual family as Cone Guy, orange-and-ink pixel style, smart uniform details, subtle charm, readable silhouette, polished game-like sprite with transparent background.

spritecook_plan.label: mailroom-press
spritecook_plan.prompt: Compact document conversion press for a digital mailroom, friendly but credible machine, intake slot and output tray, same style as the approved clerk sprite, orange-and-ink pixel art with teal display, transparent background.

spritecook_plan.label: mailroom-msg-document
spritecook_plan.prompt: Stylized email document prop labeled MSG, small mailroom game asset, same style as the approved clerk sprite, orange-and-ink pixel art, transparent background.

spritecook_plan.label: mailroom-pdf-document
spritecook_plan.prompt: Stylized PDF document prop labeled PDF, small mailroom game asset, same style as the approved clerk sprite, orange-and-ink pixel art with cool blue accents, transparent background.

spritecook_plan.label: mailroom-failed-document
spritecook_plan.prompt: Stylized failed document prop for a digital mailroom, rejected paper with readable failure treatment, same style as the approved clerk sprite, orange-and-ink pixel art with red failure slash, transparent background.
